module.name: search
module.spec: SearchItems performs a case-insensitive substring match against item names. Returns all items whose Name contains the query string. Results are sorted alphabetically by Name. An empty query returns all items (same as ListItems).
FilterByPrice filters a list of items to those within a price range [min, max] inclusive. Items with price exactly equal to min or max are included. Returns a new slice; the input is not modified.
